input.background: A South African study compared whether participating in a 5-year follow-up interview was associated with having medical aid (similar to health insurance).
input.question: Subjects were subclassified by race. Table 19.5B shows the results for white participants. Describe the relationship in this stratum.

output.answer: Among the white participants, 10 of $12(83 \\%)$ who were followed-up had medical aid. One-hundred and four of the 126 white subjects who were not followed-up $(83 \\%)$ had medical aid. Therefore, there is no association between follow-up and having medical aid in this stratum.

meta_info.caption: Is participating in a follow-up survey associated with having medical aid?
